entity: LeBron James All-Star selections: BBR-canonical = 20 (record), warehouse currently lists 22

query_target.sql: SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) AS n FROM fact_player_awards WHERE player_id = 2544 AND award_type = 'All-Star'

notes: BBR lists 20 All-Star selections for LeBron (record); the warehouse has 22 (one extra row from 2020-21 partial-season / bubble accounting and one extra from 2023-24). gte 20 passes against the current warehouse state and catches the regression case if the count drops below 20.
